# DOW-UAP-D63, Mission Report, Strait of Hormuz, October 2020 - Page 1

Declassified by MG Richard A. Harrison
USCENTCOM Chief of Staff
Declassified on: 16 March 2026
FOUO / Privacy Act applies

# Misrep 4871281

## Narrative
AT 2249Z, [1.4a] TOOK OFF FROM OKAS. AT 2300Z, [1.4a] HANDED OVER FROM THE LRE. FROM 2338Z TO 0825Z, [1.4a] FROM 1319Z TO 1855Z, [1.4a] FROM 0117Z TO 1835Z, [1.4a] SUPPORTED NAVCENT FOR OPERATION [redacted] IVO ARABIAN GULF, STRAIT OF HORMUZ AND GULF OF OMAN. SEE ISR LINE 1. AT 0727Z, [1.4a] RECEIVED A GUARDCALL. SEE GUARDCALL LINE 1. AT 0854Z, [1.4a] RECEIVED A GUARD CALL. SEE GUARDCALL LINE 2. AT 1122Z, [1.4a] RECEIVED A GUARD CALL. SEE GUARD CALL LINE 3. AT 1236Z, [1.4a] RECEIVED A GUARD CALL. SEE GUARD CALL LINE 4. AT 1315Z, [1.4a] RECEIVED GUARDCALL. SEE GUARD CALL LINE 5. AT 1829Z, [1.4a] OBSERVED 1X UAP, SEE OBSERVATION LINE 1. AT 1835Z, [1.4a] WAS CLEARED TO RTB. AT 1922Z, [1.4a] HANDED BACK TO THE LRE. AT 1953Z, [1.4a] LANDED AT OKAS. FMV WAS EXPLOITED BY DGS-1. 21 MISSION HOURS, 17.3 IMINT HOURS, 1 IMINT TASKING PROSECUTED, 15.3 [1.4a] HOURS, 3 [1.4a] TASKING PROSECUTED, 4 TOTAL TASKINGS PROSECUTED

# DOW-UAP-D63, Mission Report, Strait of Hormuz, October 2020 - Page 5

Declassified by MG Richard A. Harrison
USCENTCOM Chief of Staff
Declassified on: 16 March 2026
FOUO / Privacy Act applies

*   Primary Sensor: ANDAS4
*   Sensors Available: AH\GMESH
*   Tasking Type: PLANNED
*   Tasking or Request Number (JTAR#, AEM#, PRI#, or TIC#): -
*   BE Number (if NTISR): -
*   Tasked Start Point: 39RWK7[redacted]
*   Activity Description: ISR
*   FMV or Image File Name (if NTISR): -

GENTEXT/ISR
*   Gentext: [redacted] 1.4a COORDINATED WITH NAVCENT 24 HOURS PRIOR TO TAKE OFF. PRECOORD WAS SATISFACTORY. AT 0117Z, 1.4a ARRIVED ON STATION ISO NAVCENT FOR OPERATION [redacted] TO CHARACTERIZE IRIN\IRGCN VESSELS, UAS ACTIVITY, ACTIVITY OUTSIDE OF PORTS, AND TO ESTABLISH PATTERN OF LIFE. FROM 0117Z TO 1835Z, 1.4a CONDUCTED SCANS IAW THE TARGET DECK IN THE ARABIAN GULF (AG). AT 1244Z, 1.4a OBSERVED 1X UI AIRCRAFT ON RUNWAY AT ABU MUSA ISLAND AIRFIELD. AT 1344Z, 1.4a OBSERVED 1XU/I AIRCRAFT AT ABU MUSA ISLAND AIRFIELD ASSESSED TO BE AN ATR 72-500. AT 1657Z, 1.4a OBSERVED 1X POSS NASER WAP DOCKED IVO BUSHERH IRIN BOATYARD. AT 0727Z, 1.4a RECEIVED A GUARD CALL. SEE GUARDCALL LINE 1. AT 0854Z, 1.4a RECEIVED A GUARD CALL. SEE GUARDCALL LINE 2. AT 1122Z, 1.4a RECEIVED A GUARD CALL. SEE GUARDCALL LINE 3. AT 1236Z, 1.4a RECEIVED A GUARD CALL. SEE GUARDCALL LINE 4. AT 1835Z, 1.4a WAS CLEARED OFF TASKING AND RETURNED TO BASE (RTB)

ISR ASSET UTILIZATION
*   Supported Unit: NAVCENT
*   Supported Operation: OPERATION [redacted]
*   Precoord Time: 24 HOURS
*   Precoord Effectiveness: SATISFACTORY

WEATHER
*   Weather: (U) HEAVY HAZE PRECLUDED IMINT ANALYSIS

EFFECTIVENESS
*   Tasker:
*   Intel Gap Filled?: No
*   Gentext: -

[redacted] 3.5c, (b)(6) [redacted]

USCENTCOM MDR 26-0028
Approved for Release to AARO- FOUO / PA applies
03/16/26 000005
